[2] University of Bristol and DIMPACT, “DIMPACT Video Streaming Carbon Modelling Guidance,” 2022. Available: https://www.dimpact.org/resources.
[3] Independent Electricity System Operator (IESO), “Emissions and Grid Intensity (Ontario)—Data and Reports,” 2025. Available: https://www.ieso.ca/en/Power-Data/Data-Directory
[4] R. Hintemann and S. Hinterholzer, “Energy consumption of digital services: streaming vs. social media,” Borderstep Institute and IITP, 2022. Available: https://www.iitp.de/digital-carbon-footprint.
[5] U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, “Waste Reduction Model (WARM), Version 15: Management Practices—Landfilling and Combustion,” Oct. 2023. Available: https://www.epa.gov/warm/versions-waste-reduction-model-warm#15.
[6] Toronto Water, “2023 Drinking Water System Annual Report,” City of Toronto, Feb. 2024. Available: https://www.toronto.ca/services-payments/water-environment/tap-water-in-toronto/drinking-water-quality-reports/.
[7] U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, “MOVES3 Heavy-Duty Vehicle Population and Activity Data,” Washington, DC: EPA, Nov. 2021. Available: https://www.epa.gov/system/files/documents/2021-11/moves-hdv-dvpg-508_0.pdf
[8] US Environmental Protection Agency, “SmartWay Carrier Partner Tool: Technical Documentation,” 2023. Available: https://www.epa.gov/smartway.
[9] Natural Resources Canada, “Canada Freight Emissions Factors (Modal),” 2024. Available: https://natural-resources.canada.ca.
[10] International Civil Aviation Organization, “CORSIA CO2 Estimation and Reporting Tool (CERT) — Methodology,” 2024. Available: https://www.icao.int/environmental-protection/CORSIA.
[11] Canadian Urban Transit Association and Ontario Ministry of Transportation, “Ontario Urban Transit Fact Book—2017 Operating Data: Toronto,” 2017. Available: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nate-Wessel/TTC-funding/master/sources/Ontario_Transit_Factbooks/ttc/2017.pdf.
[12] International Civil Aviation Organization, “CORSIA Default Life Cycle Emissions Factors for International Aviation,” 2023. Available: https://www.icao.int/environmental-protection/CORSIA/Pages/default.aspx
[13] UK Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, “UK Government GHG Conversion Factors for Company Reporting: Methodology Paper for Emission Factors,” 2024. Available: https://www.gov.uk/government/collections/government-conversion-factors-for-company-reporting
[14] International Energy Agency, “Aviation,” Paris, France: IEA, 2023. Available: https://www.iea.org/reports/aviation
[15] Natural Resources Canada (NRCan), “Fuel Life Cycle Assessment Modelling for Canada,” 2024. Available: https://www.nrcan.gc.ca/energy/energy-efficiency/transportation/fuel-life-cycle-assessment/21086.
[16] J. Poore and T. Nemecek, “Reducing food’s environmental impacts through producers and consumers,” Science, vol. 360, no. 6392, pp. 987–992, 2018. Available: https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aaq0216
[17] Global Cement and Concrete Association, “Getting the Numbers Right (GNR) 2023 Data Release,” 2023. Available: https://gccassociation.org/sustainability-innovation/gnr/
[18] worldsteel Association, “Sustainable Steel—Indicators 2023,” 2023. Available: https://worldsteel.org/steel-topics/sustainable-steel/
[19] PlasticsEurope, “Plastics—The Facts 2022: An analysis of European plastics production, demand and waste data,” 2022. Available: https://plasticseurope.org/knowledge-hub/plastics-the-facts-2022/
[20] GardaWorld Protective Services, “Protective Services Sustainability and Emissions Benchmarking,” Montreal, Canada: GardaWorld, 2024. Available: https://www.garda.com/insights/protective-services-sustainability-2024
[21] A. Luccioni, A. Ligozat, and Y. Bengio, “Estimating the Carbon Footprint of Inference,” 2023. Available: https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03271.
[22] D. Patterson et al., “Carbon Emissions and Large Neural Network Training,” 2021. Available: https://arxiv.org/abs/2104.10350.
[23] Waste and Resources Action Programme (WRAP), “Valuing Our Clothes: the cost of UK fashion,” 2017. Available: https://wrap.org.uk/resources/report/valuing-our-clothes-2017
[24] Quantis, “Measuring Fashion: Environmental Impact of the Global Apparel and Footwear Industries Study,” 2018. Available: https://quantis.com/measuring-fashion-report/
[25] K. Niinimäki et al., “The environmental price of fast fashion,” Nature Reviews Earth & Environment, vol. 1, pp. 189–200, 2020. Available: https://doi.org/10.1038/s43017-020-0039-9
[26] Waste and Resources Action Programme, “Household Appliance Carbon Factors,” 2023. Available: https://wrap.org.uk/resources/report/household-appliance-carbon-factors
[27] International Energy Agency, “Cooling and Appliance Efficiency Outlook,” Paris, France: IEA, 2024. Available: https://www.iea.org/reports/cooling-and-appliance-efficiency-outlook
[28] Technology and Economic Assessment Panel, “TEAP 2023 Assessment Report—HFC Phase-down,” United Nations Environment Programme, 2023. Available: https://ozone.unep.org/assessment-panels/teap
[29] International Energy Agency Cool Coalition, “Cooling for All: Operational Benchmarks,” 2024. Available: https://www.coolcoalition.org/resources/
[30] Food and Agriculture Organization and International Energy Agency, “Cold Chain Energy and Emission Factors,” 2024. Available: https://www.fao.org/energy/newsroom/detail/en/c/1654324/
[31] National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, “Global Ocean Monitoring and Observing: State of the Ocean Climate 2023,” Silver Spring, MD, USA, 2023. [Online]. Available: https://www.noaa.gov/ocean-climate-report
[32] National Aeronautics and Space Administration, “State of the Cryosphere 2023,” Greenbelt, MD, USA, 2023. [Online]. Available: https://science.nasa.gov/earth-science/cryosphere
[33] Environment and Climate Change Canada, “Northern Canada Permafrost Network Synthesis Report,” Ottawa, ON, Canada, 2023. [Online]. Available: https://www.canada.ca/en/environment-climate-change/services/climate-change/science-research-data/permafrost.html
[34] Alberta Energy Regulator, “Tailings Management Framework: 2023 Annual Report,” Calgary, AB, Canada, 2024. [Online]. Available: https://static.aer.ca/prd/documents/reports/Tailings-Management-Framework-2023.pdf
[35] International Council on Mining and Metals, “Global Acid Rock Drainage Guidance,” London, U.K., 2022. [Online]. Available: https://www.icmm.com/en-gb/environment/materials-circularity/tailings/acid-drainage-guidance
[36] Global Ocean Oxygen Network, “Declining Oxygen: The Global Ocean Oxygen Network Status Report 2020,” Paris, France: UNESCO-IOC, 2020. [Online]. Available: https://unesdoc.unesco.org/ark:/48223/pf0000376705
